requirement_topic.en: GSO Energy-Efficiency Label for Lighting vs China Energy Label (GB 30255)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明产品 GSO 能效标签与中国能效标识（GB 30255）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明產品 GSO 能效標籤與中國能效標識（GB 30255）

summary.en: In-scope LED lamps/luminaires for the Qatar market must carry the GSO energy-efficiency label under the GCC energy-efficiency labelling scheme for lighting products, administered in Qatar by QGOSM under MOCI. The label communicates an efficiency rating (a star-band / class) derived from the product's measured luminous efficacy (lm/W) against the scheme's reference values, and requires the declared performance to be substantiated by testing to the GSO-adopted lighting performance/photometric standards. Affixing the GSO energy-efficiency label and meeting any minimum efficiency threshold for the product category is a market-access condition for regulated lighting products. The label format, rating bands, and registration route are defined by the GSO/QGOSM scheme and differ from the EU A-G / EPREL system.
summary.zh: 进入卡塔尔市场的范围内 LED 灯/灯具，须依据海湾照明产品能效标签方案贴附 GSO 能效标签，在卡塔尔由隶属 MOCI 的 QGOSM 管理。该标签传达由产品实测光效（lm/W）相对方案参考值得出的能效评级（星级/等级），并要求声明性能由依据 GSO 采纳的照明性能/光度标准的检测予以佐证。对受管制照明产品而言，贴附 GSO 能效标签并满足该产品类别的任何最低能效阈值是市场准入条件。标签格式、评级区间及注册路径由 GSO/QGOSM 方案规定，不同于欧盟 A-G / EPREL 系统。
summary.zht: 進入卡塔爾市場的範圍內 LED 燈/燈具，須依據海灣照明產品能效標籤方案貼附 GSO 能效標籤，在卡塔爾由隸屬 MOCI 的 QGOSM 管理。該標籤傳達由產品實測光效（lm/W）相對方案參考值得出的能效評級（星級/等級），並要求聲明性能由依據 GSO 採納的照明性能/光度標準的檢測予以佐證。對受管制照明產品而言，貼附 GSO 能效標籤並滿足該產品類別的任何最低能效閾值是市場准入條件。標籤格式、評級區間及注冊路徑由 GSO/QGOSM 方案規定，不同於歐盟 A-G / EPREL 系統。

standards_or_laws: GSO energy-efficiency labelling scheme for lighting products (GCC labelling programme, administered in Qatar by QGOSM / MOCI)
GSO/IEC lighting performance and photometric standards underpinning the declared efficacy

summary.en: China's equivalent is the China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires). GB 30255 defines three energy-efficiency grades — Grade 1 (highest, ≥90 lm/W), Grade 2 (≥80 lm/W), Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) — with Grade 3 as the minimum for China market entry. CEL registration with CQC/CECP is mandatory for in-scope products and is administered by SAMR; the grade is based on absolute lm/W thresholds.
summary.zh: 中国对应制度为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求）下的中国能效标识（CEL）。GB 30255 规定三个能效等级——1 级（最高，≥90 lm/W）、2 级（≥80 lm/W）、3 级（≥70 lm/W）——其中 3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。对范围内产品，向 CQC/CECP 进行 CEL 注册为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理；等级基于绝对 lm/W 阈值。
summary.zht: 中國對應制度為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求）下的中國能效標識（CEL）。GB 30255 規定三個能效等級——1 級（最高，≥90 lm/W）、2 級（≥80 lm/W）、3 級（≥70 lm/W）——其中 3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。對範圍內產品，向 CQC/CECP 進行 CEL 注冊為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理；等級基於絕對 lm/W 閾值。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both Qatar (GSO energy-efficiency label) and China (China Energy Label / GB 30255) require an energy label and a declared efficacy, but the two schemes are not mutually recognised and use different rating bands and registration routes. A product registered with CQC/CECP for the China Energy Label is not automatically accepted for the GSO energy-efficiency label — the exporter must register and label under the GSO/QGOSM scheme separately, with declared efficacy substantiated by a test report the scheme accepts. The GSO label's rating bands and any category minimum efficiency threshold must be checked against the current GSO/QGOSM scheme for the specific product category; the CN grade does not map one-to-one onto the GSO rating. Practically, the manufacturer should confirm the product's lm/W places it in an acceptable GSO rating band and obtain GSO/QGOSM registration before shipment.
gap.zh: 卡塔尔（GSO 能效标签）与中国（中国能效标识 / GB 30255）均要求能效标签及声明光效，但两套方案不互认，且采用不同的评级区间与注册路径。为中国能效标识在 CQC/CECP 注册的产品，不被自动接受用于 GSO 能效标签——出口商须另行在 GSO/QGOSM 方案下注册与贴标，声明光效须由方案接受的检测报告佐证。GSO 标签的评级区间及该类别的任何最低能效阈值，须依据现行 GSO/QGOSM 方案就具体产品类别核查；中国等级不与 GSO 评级一一对应。实务上，制造商应确认产品 lm/W 落入可接受的 GSO 评级区间，并在出货前取得 GSO/QGOSM 注册。
gap.zht: 卡塔爾（GSO 能效標籤）與中國（中國能效標識 / GB 30255）均要求能效標籤及聲明光效，但兩套方案不互認，且採用不同的評級區間與注冊路徑。為中國能效標識在 CQC/CECP 注冊的產品，不被自動接受用於 GSO 能效標籤——出口商須另行在 GSO/QGOSM 方案下注冊與貼標，聲明光效須由方案接受的檢測報告佐證。GSO 標籤的評級區間及該類別的任何最低能效閾值，須依據現行 GSO/QGOSM 方案就具體產品類別核查；中國等級不與 GSO 評級一一對應。實務上，製造商應確認產品 lm/W 落入可接受的 GSO 評級區間，並在出貨前取得 GSO/QGOSM 注冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (in scope) — GSO energy-efficiency label required for regulated lighting products under the GCC labelling scheme, administered by QGOSM, before Qatar market placement; any category minimum efficiency threshold must be met
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (in scope) — China Energy Label registration with CQC/CECP required under GB 30255-2019; Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) energy-efficiency labelling programme — administered in Qatar by QGOSM / MOCI

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] In-scope LED lighting for Qatar requires the GSO energy-efficiency label under the GCC labelling scheme administered by QGOSM, with declared efficacy substantiated by an accepted test report. China's GB 30255 China Energy Label is a parallel, non-mutual scheme using different rating bands — CQC/CECP registration does not substitute for GSO/QGOSM registration, and the CN grade does not map one-to-one onto the GSO rating. Confirm the product's lm/W places it in an acceptable GSO band and complete GSO/QGOSM registration before shipment. Verify the current scheme's bands and any category minimum threshold.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入卡塔尔的范围内 LED 照明须依据 QGOSM 管理的海湾标签方案贴附 GSO 能效标签，声明光效须由被接受的检测报告佐证。中国 GB 30255 中国能效标识为并行的非互认方案，采用不同评级区间——CQC/CECP 注册不可替代 GSO/QGOSM 注册，且中国等级不与 GSO 评级一一对应。请确认产品 lm/W 落入可接受的 GSO 区间，并在出货前完成 GSO/QGOSM 注册。请核实现行方案的区间及任何类别最低阈值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入卡塔爾的範圍內 LED 照明須依據 QGOSM 管理的海灣標籤方案貼附 GSO 能效標籤，聲明光效須由被接受的檢測報告佐證。中國 GB 30255 中國能效標識為並行的非互認方案，採用不同評級區間——CQC/CECP 注冊不可替代 GSO/QGOSM 注冊，且中國等級不與 GSO 評級一一對應。請確認產品 lm/W 落入可接受的 GSO 區間，並在出貨前完成 GSO/QGOSM 注冊。請核實現行方案的區間及任何類別最低閾值。

requirement_topic.en: QGOSM Conformity, Registration and In-Country Importer vs CCC
requirement_topic.zh: QGOSM 符合性、注册与当地进口商 vs CCC
requirement_topic.zht: QGOSM 符合性、注冊與當地進口商 vs CCC

summary.en: Placing regulated LED lighting on the Qatar market requires conformity demonstration and registration under QGOSM (Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology, under MOCI). The exporter/importer must compile a technical/conformity file (test reports against the applicable GSO/IEC safety, EMC, photobiological, performance, and energy-label standards), and the goods must be imported by a licensed in-country importer registered in Qatar — a foreign manufacturer cannot place product directly without a Qatar-based importer/representative. Consignments arrive primarily through Hamad Port and are subject to customs and QGOSM market-surveillance checks. Where a conformity certificate / registration is required for the product category, it must be obtained before clearance and sale.
summary.zh: 将受管制 LED 照明投放卡塔尔市场，须在 QGOSM（卡塔尔标准与计量总局，隶属 MOCI）下进行符合性证明与注册。出口商/进口商须编制技术/符合性文件（依据适用的 GSO/IEC 安全、EMC、光生物、性能及能效标签标准的检测报告），且货物须由在卡塔尔注册的持牌当地进口商进口——外国制造商不能在无卡塔尔当地进口商/代表的情况下直接投放产品。货物主要经哈马德港（Hamad Port）入境，须接受海关及 QGOSM 市场监管查验。对于产品类别须取得符合性证书/注册者，须在清关与销售前取得。
summary.zht: 將受管制 LED 照明投放卡塔爾市場，須在 QGOSM（卡塔爾標準與計量總局，隸屬 MOCI）下進行符合性證明與注冊。出口商/進口商須編制技術/符合性文件（依據適用的 GSO/IEC 安全、EMC、光生物、性能及能效標籤標準的檢測報告），且貨物須由在卡塔爾注冊的持牌當地進口商進口——外國製造商不能在無卡塔爾當地進口商/代表的情況下直接投放產品。貨物主要經哈馬德港（Hamad Port）入境，須接受海關及 QGOSM 市場監管查驗。對於產品類別須取得符合性證書/注冊者，須在清關與銷售前取得。

standards_or_laws: QGOSM (Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology, under MOCI) — conformity and registration for regulated products
GSO technical regulations and GSO/IEC standards applied by QGOSM as the conformity basis

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for in-scope luminaires is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and conducted by bodies such as CQC, requiring third-party certification against GB 7000 / GB 24906 and related standards. There is no requirement to appoint a foreign-market in-country importer for the domestic China market. CCC marking and the China Energy Label govern domestic placement; these are issued under Chinese authorities and are not recognised by QGOSM.
summary.zh: 在中国，范围内灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理并由 CQC 等机构实施，要求依据 GB 7000 / GB 24906 及相关标准进行第三方认证。对中国国内市场而言，无须指定外国市场的当地进口商。CCC 标识与中国能效标识管辖国内投放；二者由中国主管机构颁发，不被 QGOSM 认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，範圍內燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理並由 CQC 等機構實施，要求依據 GB 7000 / GB 24906 及相關標準進行第三方認證。對中國國內市場而言，無須指定外國市場的當地進口商。CCC 標識與中國能效標識管轄國內投放；二者由中國主管機構頒發，不被 QGOSM 認可。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for in-scope luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: CCC and QGOSM conformity are parallel, non-mutual market-access regimes. A Chinese luminaire holding CCC and the China Energy Label cannot rely on those for Qatar — it must assemble a QGOSM conformity file based on the GSO/IEC standards (safety, EMC, photobiological, performance, GSO energy label) and obtain any required QGOSM conformity certificate/registration. The most important structural difference for the exporter: Qatar requires a licensed in-country importer/representative to place the goods (no direct foreign placement), whereas the China market requires no such foreign-importer step. Logistics route via Hamad Port with customs + QGOSM market surveillance. Verify, per product category, which specific GSO standards and which QGOSM registration/certificate apply, and engage a Qatar importer early — they typically coordinate registration, CRA approval (if wireless), and labelling.
gap.zh: CCC 与 QGOSM 符合性是并行的非互认市场准入制度。持有 CCC 及中国能效标识的中国灯具，不能据此进入卡塔尔——须依据 GSO/IEC 标准（安全、EMC、光生物、性能、GSO 能效标签）编制 QGOSM 符合性文件，并取得任何须取得的 QGOSM 符合性证书/注册。对出口商最重要的结构性差异是：卡塔尔要求由持牌的当地进口商/代表投放货物（不可外国直接投放），而中国市场无此外国进口商环节。物流经哈马德港，须接受海关 + QGOSM 市场监管。请就各产品类别核实适用的具体 GSO 标准及 QGOSM 注册/证书，并尽早委托卡塔尔进口商——其通常协调注册、CRA 核准（若为无线）及标识。
gap.zht: CCC 與 QGOSM 符合性是並行的非互認市場准入制度。持有 CCC 及中國能效標識的中國燈具，不能據此進入卡塔爾——須依據 GSO/IEC 標準（安全、EMC、光生物、性能、GSO 能效標籤）編制 QGOSM 符合性文件，並取得任何須取得的 QGOSM 符合性證書/注冊。對出口商最重要的結構性差異是：卡塔爾要求由持牌的當地進口商/代表投放貨物（不可外國直接投放），而中國市場無此外國進口商環節。物流經哈馬德港，須接受海關 + QGOSM 市場監管。請就各產品類別核實適用的具體 GSO 標準及 QGOSM 注冊/證書，並盡早委托卡塔爾進口商——其通常協調注冊、CRA 核准（若為無線）及標識。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — QGOSM conformity demonstration/registration required for regulated lighting before Qatar market placement; goods must be imported by a licensed in-country importer/representative
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (in scope) — CCC certification required for in-scope luminaires (CNCA/CQC); no foreign in-country importer required for the domestic market

source.publisher: Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI), State of Qatar — QGOSM standards and conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access for LED lighting in Qatar runs through QGOSM conformity and registration based on GSO/IEC standards, plus the GSO energy-efficiency label and (if wireless) CRA approval — a parallel, non-mutual regime to China's CCC and China Energy Label. The decisive structural requirement is a licensed in-country importer/representative to place the goods (no direct foreign placement), with consignments routed via Hamad Port and subject to QGOSM market surveillance. Build a QGOSM conformity file from the applicable GSO/IEC test reports and engage a Qatar importer early. Verify the exact GSO standards and QGOSM registration/certificate for the product category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卡塔尔 LED 照明的市场准入通过基于 GSO/IEC 标准的 QGOSM 符合性与注册，外加 GSO 能效标签及（若为无线）CRA 核准——这是与中国 CCC 及中国能效标识并行的非互认制度。决定性的结构性要求是由持牌的当地进口商/代表投放货物（不可外国直接投放），货物经哈马德港并接受 QGOSM 市场监管。请依据适用的 GSO/IEC 检测报告编制 QGOSM 符合性文件，并尽早委托卡塔尔进口商。请核实该产品类别的确切 GSO 标准及 QGOSM 注册/证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 卡塔爾 LED 照明的市場准入通過基於 GSO/IEC 標準的 QGOSM 符合性與注冊，外加 GSO 能效標籤及（若為無線）CRA 核准——這是與中國 CCC 及中國能效標識並行的非互認制度。決定性的結構性要求是由持牌的當地進口商/代表投放貨物（不可外國直接投放），貨物經哈馬德港並接受 QGOSM 市場監管。請依據適用的 GSO/IEC 檢測報告編制 QGOSM 符合性文件，並盡早委托卡塔爾進口商。請核實該產品類別的確切 GSO 標準及 QGOSM 注冊/證書。
